lesson: PGM auto-unstick parses ## Dependencies sections and checks issue states — keep dependency format consistent across issues
fix: Added _check_stuck_dependencies() to PGM bash pre-checks with _parse_dependencies() static parser

lesson: Standalone test scripts should be truly self-contained — no shared imports, even if it means duplicating connection config across files.
fix: Each script gets its own SERIAL constant and run_test helper rather than a shared test_utils module.

lesson: Hybrid event architecture (SDK events + NUC bus) avoids reinventing hardware event plumbing while keeping custom compute events lightweight.
fix: Use SDK events for hardware (cliff, touch, face), NUC bus for AI-computed events (YOLO, follow state, STT).

lesson: Post-merge doc checks catch REPO_MAP drift early — always update REPO_MAP.md when adding new directories.
fix: Added apps/vector/tests/standalone/ to REPO_MAP.md with a Testing section explaining both test locations.

lesson: Auto-generated doc-check issues after merges catch REPO_MAP.md drift early — keep the post-merge hook.
fix: Added events/ directory to REPO_MAP.md to match actual file structure from PR #43.

lesson: Safety-critical event ordering matters — emit action-triggering events (emergency_stop) before diagnostic events (cliff_triggered) to avoid delaying motor stop.
fix: Reordered event emissions in SdkEventBridge to emit emergency_stop before cliff_triggered.

lesson: CI environment lacks NUC-only packages (anki_vector, cv2) — tests that lazily import these need sys.modules stubs in conftest and CI pip deps must include opencv-python-headless
fix: Added anki_vector stub in tests/vector/conftest.py and opencv-python-headless to qa-pipeline.yml CI deps

lesson: Post-merge doc checks catch REPO_MAP drift for new files, not just directories — always add new runtime files to REPO_MAP.md.
fix: Added sensor_handler.py to apps/vector/src/ section of REPO_MAP.md.

lesson: CLAUDE.md doc updates for new agent features need Ophir approval — auto-generated doc-check issues track what needs updating after merges.
fix: Documented PGM auto-unstick behavior and ## Dependencies convention in CLAUDE.md

lesson: 61% of dispatch cycles wasted on rebases and pre-existing CI — auto-rebase in merge gate and doc-only PR filtering are highest-impact workflow fixes.
fix: Added _auto_rebase_pr() to merge gate, doc-only PR skip in _post_merge_doc_check(), main_ci_healthy() pre-dispatch warning.

lesson: OpenVINO setup scripts should be standalone and idempotent — download to MODEL_DIR not CWD, use pip3 not pip, lazy-import heavy deps.
fix: chdir to models/ before YOLO export, pip3 in setup.sh, numpy imported inside benchmark functions

lesson: Lazy-import anki_vector inside functions (not at module level) so CI stubs work — conftest must stub all used submodules (util, events).
fix: Moved anki_vector import into run_health_check() and degrees import into check_head() fn closure; added anki_vector.util stub to conftest.

lesson: Position-only Kalman (cx,cy) with frozen bbox dimensions prevents the oscillation that plagued R3 — never predict bbox w/h since YOLO sizes vary naturally.
fix: State vector [cx,cy,vx,vy] only; w/h frozen at last YOLO measurement, updated only in update() never in predict().

lesson: Avoid pytest assertion rewrite on large list comparisons (e.g. list(img.getdata())) — use tobytes() for pixel data comparison to prevent pytest hanging on diff generation.
fix: Used img.tobytes() instead of list(img.getdata()) for all pixel comparison assertions in display tests.

lesson: SDK AudioFeed signal_power field contains raw PCM audio (1600 int16 at 15625 Hz), not power metadata — proto field names are misleading.
fix: Parse signal_power as int16 LE PCM, resample 15625->16000 Hz via linear interpolation for STT/wake word compatibility.
